#2 TikTok

I asked who he'd put his brainwave headset on. Instant answer: Messi. His theory: elite athletes melt down the first time the game beats them. Naturals blow right through.

#3 TikTok

Every productivity video tells you to add something. This CEO's entire system is one question: what can I remove? He builds focus tech, and he runs his company the same way. Full episode on YouTube, Spotify and Apple.

604 views
#4 TikTok

Billions of pounds of food rot in the field every year, and it's not because nobody wants it. Farmers can't afford to harvest crops they haven't sold.

672 views

She wanted plants for her first apartment and found nowhere good to buy them. So she left brand strategy and built it herself. That was 2012.

605 views
#6 TikTok

About the Host

Yohann Calpu.

Host of Pale Blue Nexus. Co-founder, Aloomii.

Yohann Calpu has been making podcasts for nine years, across five shows. The operating principle is genuine curiosity. He sent Jim Rogers his first cold email seventeen years before they recorded together. That is how Pale Blue Nexus is built.

He is a father of two. Off the mic, he mountain bikes, hikes, gardens, and adds to a growing collection of Magic: The Gathering cards, comics, and video games. He hosts from Caledonia, Ontario, in the Grand River corridor.

The show explores AI, space, physics, and the technologies reshaping our species, through long-form conversations with the founders, investors, and operators actually doing the work. The frame is Carl Sagan's. Everything we cover happens here, on the pale blue dot, while everything around us changes.

Yohann is also the co-founder of Aloomii, an AI operations company building agent fleets for relationship-driven businesses.

Coming Up

Who's at the mic next.

A pipeline of operators, founders, and investors at the frontier of AI, space, and emerging tech.

Coming Next Week

Austin Armstrong

CEO, Syllaby. Managing Partner, Bullhouse Ventures.

More than 4 million followers across social media. CEO and co-founder of Syllaby, an AI startup helping content creators produce, schedule, and publish video at speed. Managing Partner at Bullhouse Ventures. Co-founder of AI Marketing World. Best-selling author of VIRALITY!

 Coming Next Week

Nectarios Economakis

Partner, Amiral Ventures. Co-founder, The PNR.

Twenty years inside the Canadian tech ecosystem. First BD hire at Google Montreal, where he helped drive 50% year-over-year growth from 2011. Co-founded The PNR, a management consulting firm focused on corporate strategy and value creation. Now Partner at Amiral Ventures, an early-stage and growth venture fund based in Montreal.

 Episode 04

Nikola Borisov

Co-founder & CEO, DeepInfra

The AI inference layer is the next bottleneck in enterprise AI, and Nikola is building it. DeepInfra just closed a $107M Series B led by 500 Global, with NVIDIA and Samsung Next participating, bringing total funding to $133M. The company processes nearly 5 trillion tokens per week across its own GPU infrastructure in 8 US data centers and supports 190+ open-source models.

 Coming Soon

Eliza Blank

CEO, The Farmlink Project. Founder, The Sill.

Thirteen years building The Sill, the houseplant company that turned a niche hobby into a category and put "plant parent" into the cultural vocabulary. Twelve stores across seven markets, $25M raised, exited in 2024. Now CEO of The Farmlink Project, a national nonprofit rescuing surplus produce from farms to food banks. Farmlink moved 150 million pounds in 2025 and half a billion pounds since 2020, across all 50 states.

 Coming Soon

Steve Gullans, PhD

CEO, Thynk Inc. Co-founder, Excel Venture Management.

Eighteen years on Harvard Medical School faculty, 130+ scientific papers, AAAS Fellow. Co-founder of Excel Venture Management, a Boston life sciences VC. Co-author with Juan Enriquez of Evolving Ourselves: Redesigning the Future of Humanity. Now CEO of Thynk Inc, applying cognitive training to ADHD and brain performance.

 Coming Soon

Haren Bhakta, CFA

Co-founder, Vault AI. Former Head of Product, Dapper Labs.

Built product at the intersection of AI and finance for over a decade. Former Head of Product at Dapper Labs (NBA Top Shot, Flow blockchain). Now co-founder of Vault AI, building intelligent infrastructure for financial services. Deep expertise in go-to-market strategy for technical products.

Latest Episode

Episode 03 - Austin Armstrong

He has 5 million followers, 270K SaaS signups, and a bet on the AI wave that paid off. Austin sat down with Yohann to talk about the death of the 40-hour work week, why he built a startup incubator in Durham, and how he went from fan in the back row to owner of the conference.

Episode 03

The 40-Hour Work Week Is Dead. AI Killed It.

Austin Armstrong has 5 million followers, 270K Syllaby signups, and a startup incubator in Durham, NC. We talked about why he bet his agency on the AI wave, the comeback of in-person community in an AI-displaced world, why the 40-hour work week is already dead, and how he went from the back of the room to owning the conference.

May 2026 Full Interview

What We're About

Curious Conversations
About What Comes Next

In a world flooded with algorithmic feeds and AI-generated noise, we offer something different, real humans exploring the technologies shaping our future with honesty and wonder.

Genuinely Curious

We don't pretend to have all the answers. We ask real questions, sit with uncertainty, and follow the thread wherever it leads.

Grounded Perspective

No breathless hype. We dig into the technologies and breakthroughs reshaping our world, and what they actually mean for the future we're building together.

Real Humans

Host Yohann talks with founders, scientists, and thinkers who are shaping tomorrow, candid conversations you won't find in your algorithm.
